description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the WarehouseDashboard solution. Use the ASP.NET Core scaffolding engine to generate a CRUD web interface for the WarehouseAsset (WarehouseDashboard.Models) model using the WarehouseContext (WarehouseDashboard.Data) data context. Name the controller WarehouseAssetsController and ensure views are generated. Build the solution to verify the generated code compiles successfully.
